race.comment: REAL BAKER (13) is a speedy gelding resuming for the Baker stable. Scored with a fair bit in hand on debut at Orange before spelling and has trialled up strongly in readiness. Expect him to dart across from the wide draw and take plenty of catching. ZOCKETMAN (5) is a promising colt resuming for the Freedmans. Was a very impressive winner of his first two before bleeding at Rosehill. Strips fitter for three trials and will get every chance from the inside pillar. ECHELON (12) progressed nicely second-up at Scone when sent forward, only to be gunned down late. Strips fitter and will be right there again with Nock sticking. OCCULT (2) put two sharp wins together last prep and looks to have come back in good order, assessing his recent Scone trial. Gets in well with the claim and is worth including.
